title: hedysarum candidissimum
intro: Hedysarum candidissimum, also known as the White Sweet Pea or White Hedysarum, is a perennial legume native to Asia and Europe. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and promoting wound healing. Hedysarum candidissimum can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its roots and flowers are often used in herbal preparations to support respiratory health and immune function.
